caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied back and wearing black over-ear headphones is speaking in a studio setting. She is dressed in a black t-shirt and sits behind a professional black microphone on a boom arm. Behind her is a white wall with a yellow vertical stripe and a black screen displaying the word "Johnson" in red text, with a smaller label above it that reads "Employee Only". Across the bottom of the scene, several graphics appear, including the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the woman's facial expression shifts from a focused speaking posture to a slight smile, and she turns her head slightly to her left while continuing to talk. The background and equipment remain stationary throughout the clip, with the camera maintaining a steady medium shot of the subject.
